enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root announces Lyme disease flare-up, cancels Movement on the Mountain show
enrichment.description_long: June 19, 2025 Facebook post in which Hunter Root, with Bald Hippie Productions, announces he is experiencing his most intense Lyme disease flare-up and cannot perform at Movement on the Mountain. He apologizes to fans and says he looks forward to getting back on the road later that summer. Hand-lettered graphic-art image.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root is with Bald Hippie Productions. June 19, 2025. Apologies to Movement on the Mountain. We wish we could be there. Hey all, Hunter here with some tough news. I am currently experiencing the most intense flareup of Lyme Disease I can recall. Doctors have been helping me to get my symptoms under control, but my body is not responding as quickly as it usually does to medicine; certainly not enough to perform this weekend. Unfortunately, I need to cancel my performance at Movement on the Mountain. This is a total drag; I'm sorry to disappoint my fans at Music on the Mountain. I look forward to getting back out on the road later this summer. Much love - Hunter

enrichment.description_short: Ticketing page for Hunter Root at The Abbey Bar, Harrisburg PA, March 16, 2024
enrichment.description_long: Event listing on TheTicketing.co for Hunter Root live at The Abbey Bar in Harrisburg, PA on March 16, 2024, presented by Moon Peak Productions. Tickets from $24.02, doors at 8pm, music at 8:30pm. Includes a bio describing Hunter as a Lancaster PA-based psychedelic rock artist with 100k+ followers.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root Live at The Abbey Bar. Moon Peak Productions. MAR 16, 2024. SATURDAY 8:00 PM EDT TO 11:00 PM EDT. Harrisburg, PA - The Abbey Bar. Get Tickets from $24.02. Doors: 8pm. Music: 8:30pm. Advance: $15. Day of Show: $20. Openers TBA. $1 For every ticket bought to be donated to The Chesapeake Bay Foundation.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root covers 'Little Red Riding Hood' outside Manheim PA high school, June 2023
enrichment.description_long: June 12, 2023 Facebook video. Hunter Root performs an impromptu live take of 'Little Red Riding Hood' outside the high school he attended in Manheim, Pennsylvania. Part of his Acid Palms cover video series, with another Acid Palms video dropping that Friday on YouTube. 1.2K likes, 25K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. June 12, 2023. I did an impromptu live take of 'Little Red Riding Hood' outside of the highschool I went to in good ol' Manheim Pennsylvania. Another hella cool vid from Acid Palms on the way. Dropping it this Friday on my YouTube! #singersongwriter #coverso...

enrichment.description_short: CANCELED: Hunter Root at The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls, Millvale PA, November 14, 2025
enrichment.description_long: Facebook event page for a canceled Hunter Root show at The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls in Millvale, PA on November 14, 2025, part of the Crooked Home Tour. Support from One Eye Daddys. Tickets were $25.25; refunds being processed. 105 people had responded.
enrichment.extracted_text: CANCELED! Mr. Smalls Presents: Hunter Root wsg One Eye Daddys. Friday, November 14, 2025 at 7 PM. The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls. 400 LINCOLN AVE. MILLVALE PA 15209. 7PM DOORS. $25.25. WWW.MRSMALLS.COM. Hunter Root - crooked home tour. 105 people responded. THIS SHOW HAS BEEN CANCELED! TICKET HOLDERS WILL BE REFUNDED!

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root previews early-stage original song after Instagram hack, August 2023
enrichment.description_long: August 10, 2023 Facebook video. Hunter Root performing an early-stage original song with lyrics 'Gotta get it now or it'll get you in the end / collecting like dust on a.' His Instagram had been hacked the previous week. 899 likes, 16K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. August 10, 2023. The early stages of a new one. Nothing helps me more mentally than putting how I feel into song. Since getting my IG h*cked last week I've been a little down in the dumps. Bless this universe for giving us music. Gotta get it now or it'll get you in the end. it'll get you in the end collecting like dust on a.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root performs 'California Sober' live in-studio at Rok 10 Productions, Lancaster PA
enrichment.description_long: October 31, 2023 Facebook video. Hunter Root performing 'California Sober' live in-studio, shot by Karl McWherter Photography at Rok 10 Productions in Lancaster, PA. First in a planned series of live in-studio videos. 654 likes, 18K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. October 31, 2023. I'm gonna be dropping a round of live in-studio videos shot by Karl McWherter Photography at Rok 10 Productions right in my hometown of Lancaster, PA. First one here is called 'California Sober' off of my l...

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root hits 100k followers, announces Hollywood trip and June 30 album drop
enrichment.description_long: June 26, 2023 Facebook post. Hunter Root celebrates reaching 100k followers and announces he is in Hollywood on a music business trip, with a new album dropping June 30th. A July 7 gig fell through; seeking a venue en route to CannaBash Fest. Booking: jdpentertainment23@gmail.com.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. June 26, 2023. Update for ya's. First off, thank you for 100k followers! I love you all. I'm in Hollywood, California on a music business trip this week. We had a gig fall through next Friday 7/7 on our way to CannaBash Fest. Please send serious inquiries only to jdpentertainment23@gmail.com. NEW ALBUM STREAMING EVERYWHERE JUNE 30TH. 100k followers.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root performs original song with 'hellhole' lyric, home setting, May 2023
enrichment.description_long: May 25, 2023 Facebook video. Hunter Root performing an original song with the lyric 'Dreaming up ways of gettin' outta this hellhole, shift your perspective, turn it all to rubble.' Acoustic guitar, home setting. 996 likes, 18K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. May 25, 2023. 'Dreaming up ways of gettin' outta this hellhole, shift your perspective, turn it all to rubble' #musician #singersongwriter #songwriter #indieartist #indiemusic #folkmusic #indiefolk #originalmusic #foryou #foryoupage.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root merch update — shipping delays, photo of merch table with shirts and vinyl
enrichment.description_long: September 11, 2023 Facebook post. Hunter Root addresses delays fulfilling online merch orders due to touring schedule and high volume. Plans to ship before hitting the road to play Industry. Photo shows a Hunter Root merch table with shirts, vinyl records, and merchandise.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. September 11, 2023. This is a message to everyone who has ordered merch from me online. THANK YOU for your order and your patience! My sincerest apologies for the delay. I'll be shipping as many as I can before we hit the road this Thursday to play Industry. You didn't get scammed, your order is coming. #independentartist #diy #merch

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root performs original song with 'phony high finally fades' lyric, December 2022
enrichment.description_long: December 20, 2022 Facebook video. Hunter Root performing an original song snippet: 'Gonna have me hell to pay when the phony high finally fades.' Home setting, acoustic guitar. Mentions delaying posting until better audio/video setup. 609 likes, 13K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. December 20, 2022. Been putting off posting until I get a better audio and video setup but it's taking a wee bit longer than expected. Very soon though! Till then, here's a verse of something I came up with the other day. Gonna have me hell to pay when the phony high finally fades. #singersongwriter #indieartist #folk

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root birthday selfie, thanks fans for wishes, November 10, 2020
enrichment.description_long: November 10, 2020 Facebook post. Hunter Root thanks fans for birthday wishes with a close-up selfie wearing a black and white stripe shirt. Warm personal post. 192 likes.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. November 10, 2020. Just wanted to say you all have me feeling blessed for having such loving people in my life. Thank you for the birthday wishes.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root New Year's Eve selfie in yellow shirt and beaded necklace, December 31, 2020
enrichment.description_long: December 31, 2020 Facebook post. Hunter Root shares a selfie in a yellow shirt with beaded necklaces and a decorative belt, expressing excitement about his outfit and wishing fans a happy new year. 217 likes.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. December 31, 2020. Stoked about this belt/shirt combo. Hope you all have a lovely new years. Life has been wild, here's to forever growing.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root announces May 1 single release and Bandcamp push, April 2020
enrichment.description_long: April 27, 2020 Facebook post. Hunter Root announces a single dropping May 1st, a back-burner song re-recorded for his acoustic record. Also plans to push his Bandcamp discography on the same day when fees are waived. B&W selfie after cutting 8 inches of hair.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. April 27, 2020. I haven't posted in a MINUTE. Just wanted to say I'm releasing a single this coming Friday, May 1st. It's a song I've had on the back burner for a while, but I decided to let it fly while I rerecorded this acoustic record. Bandcamp is waiving their fees again on the 1st so I'm hoping to push my discography too. Oh and I cut like 8 inches of hair off. Hope y'all are staying safe!

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root tribute to his brother Nick Root who passed away at age 27, April 2021
enrichment.description_long: April 22, 2021 Facebook post. Hunter Root writes a deeply personal tribute to his brother Nick Root, who passed away at age 27. Nick inspired Hunter to start playing guitar. Post includes childhood photos from growing up in Arkansas. An essential personal document in the Hunter Root archive.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. April 22, 2021. This post is dedicated to my dear brother, Nick Root. He passed away a week ago at the age of 27. We are only 11 months apart. I've never lost someone this close to my heart before. Underneath that calloused exterior of yours was always a loving, brilliant, and talented man. I'll never forget the way you cared for me growing up as kiddos and all the things you taught me as a big brother. Hell, I started playing guitar because of you! That little spark of inspiration changed my life forever. Thank you, Nick. I love you, I miss you, and I'm glad your suffering is over. And to everyone reading this, don't forget to tell your friends and loved ones what they mean to you.

enrichment.description_short: Childhood photo of Hunter and Nick Root as young boys near a truck, Arkansas
enrichment.description_long: Facebook photo viewer showing a childhood photo from Hunter Root's April 22, 2021 tribute post for his brother Nick Root. Two young blond boys near a silver pickup truck in rural Arkansas. Part of a set of childhood photos shared in the tribute.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. April 22, 2021. This photo is from a post. View post. No comments yet.

enrichment.description_short: Seeds band first plugged-in show at Chameleon Club, Lancaster PA, October 12, 2012
enrichment.description_long: Facebook event page for the first plugged-in show by Seeds (formerly Seed) at the Chameleon Club in Lancaster, PA on October 12, 2012. Band included Wynton Alan Huddle, Hunter Root, Alex Aument, and a new bassist. $6 admission. An early pre-career document from Hunter Root's band era.
enrichment.extracted_text: Seeds 1st plugged in Show at the Chameleon! Friday, October 12, 2012 at 8 PM. Chameleon Club. Event by Wynton Alan Huddle. Yes, we're 'Seeds' now, since 'seed' is taken. For 6 dollars a ticket, you can see the new band with me (wynton), Hunter Root, and Alex Aument, and MAYBE our new bassist! Lancaster, Pennsylvania.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root video: 'Lyme disease is kicking my ass', November 2, 2025
enrichment.description_long: November 2, 2025 Facebook video. Hunter Root delivers a personal update about his Lyme disease battle. Outdoor setting, denim jacket. 1.7K likes, 34K views, 414 comments. Mike Lang commented a sending-hugs sticker; Charles Varndell expressed support.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. November 2, 2025. Lyme disease is kicking my ass. #lymedisease #Lyme #musician. Mike Lang (Top fan): Sending hugs. Charles Varndell (Top fan): Love you Hunter! You're doing plenty! Hope you get relief as quick as possible!

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root performs 'Flash in the Pan' full take outdoors, November 2025 — 174K views
enrichment.description_long: November 1, 2025 Facebook video. Hunter Root performs 'Flash in the Pan' full take outdoors among trees, acoustic guitar. Lyric: 'hotel to motel to hotel please.' 7.6K likes, 174K views, 290 comments. One of Hunter's most-viewed videos.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. November 1, 2025. Here's the full take of 'Flash in the Pan' I did the other day. #singersongwriter #original #song #countrymusic #blues. Flash in the Pan. hotel to motel to hotel please. Mike Lang (Top fan): America's Sweetest Badass!

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root/ElmThree Productions tour announcement for Crooked Home album, October 2025
enrichment.description_long: October 15, 2025 Facebook video by Hunter Root and ElmThree Productions. Hunter announces going on tour supporting the Crooked Home album releasing that Friday. Tour dates include Oct 16 Hill Country New York, Nov 13 Milkboy Philadelphia. Tickets at HunterRoot.com. 17K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root and ElmThree Productions. October 15, 2025. My Brother's Bones - Hunter Root. I'm going on tour this month supporting the upcoming album Crooked Home out this Friday. Please don't wait to buy tickets at HunterRoot.com! Oct 16th - Hill Country - New York, NY. Nov 13th - Milkboy - Philadelphia. I'm going on tour!

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root asks fans to help rebuild Instagram following after hack, July 2024
enrichment.description_long: July 1, 2024 Facebook video. Hunter Root asks fans to help rebuild his Instagram following after getting hacked and losing 100K followers the prior year. Mentions an upcoming fall tour on sale. 1.3K likes, 31K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. July 1, 2024. Happy July! Can y'all do me a solid and help me rebuild my Instagram following? Last year I got hacked and lost all of my 100K followers. I'm just out here trying to share my music and catch you at an upcoming show (fall tour on sale now!).

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root performs heartbreak-inspired original song snippet, December 2023
enrichment.description_long: December 4, 2023 Facebook video. Hunter Root performs an original song inspired by heartbreak, conceived while watching TV. Caption: 'You haven't lived until you've gotten your heart broken.' Home setting, acoustic guitar. 543 likes, 15K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. December 4, 2023. You haven't lived until you've gotten your heart broken. Always good inspiration for a song. This idea came to me quickly while I was watching TV the other day. #singersongwriter #originalmusic #fyp #countrymusic #americana #indieartist.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root selfie in van heading to free solo set at Ray Brothers Barbeque, Bouckville NY
enrichment.description_long: March 9, 2024 Facebook post. Hunter Root shares a van selfie announcing a free solo set at Ray Brothers Barbeque in Bouckville, NY that night. Music 9-11pm. DIY tour post.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. March 9, 2024. I'm feeling gooooood heading to Bouckville, NY to play another solo set at Ray Brothers Barbeque tonight! It's a free show! Music 9-11pm. #tour #independentartist #diy

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root TikTok crosspost — gratitude after 'Town Rat Heathen' viral moment, new album teased
enrichment.description_long: February 16, 2023 Facebook video. Hunter Root shares a TikTok intro video thanking everyone who followed him since 'Town Rat Heathen' went viral. Teases a new album coming soon. Text overlay: 'Hey, TikTok. My name is Hunter Root.' 3.2K likes, 44K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. February 16, 2023. This goes for Facebook too! I wanted to share my appreciation for everyone that has followed me since releasing 'Town Rat Heathen'. Y'all are making my dreams come true. New album right around the corner y'all. Stay tuned, much love. Hey, TikTok. My name is Hunter Root. I wanted to make a video.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root outfit photos heading to Beardfest XI music festival, June 22, 2023
enrichment.description_long: June 22, 2023 Facebook post. Hunter Root shares three outfit photos before heading to Beardfest XI music festival, performing at 7pm. Green jacket and flannel. 1.5K likes, 108 comments.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. June 22, 2023. Heading to Beardfest XI! Here is the getup for today. I hit the stage at 7pm tonight! #musician #singersongwriter #countrymusic #altcountry #musicfestival #tour #livemusic #foryou.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root shows the spare bedroom where he recorded 'Town Rat Heathen' and 'Arkansas' album
enrichment.description_long: November 25, 2023 Facebook video. Hunter Root shows the spare bedroom that served as his home recording studio for 'Town Rat Heathen' and the full 'Arkansas' album. Green screen visible, minimal gear. Caption: 'Just a spare bedroom and a little bit of gear is all you need!' 651 likes, 22K views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. November 25, 2023. This is where I recorded 'Town Rat Heathen' and the entirety of my latest album 'Arkansas'. Just a spare bedroom and a little bit of gear is all you need! #indieArtist #independentartist #DIY #homestudio #singersongwriter #producer.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root TikTok song snippet, pre-save link for 'Quicksand Sinking' single, March 2022
enrichment.description_long: March 29, 2022 Facebook video. Hunter Root shares a brief song idea from TikTok, promoting a pre-save link for an upcoming single on Distrokid (hunterroot/quicksand-sinking). 105 likes, 570 views.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. March 29, 2022. Brief song idea from my TikTok. I'm gonna spam y'all with my single release until it's out so go pre-save my new song right here! I appreciate you! https://distrokid.com/hyperf.../hunterroot/quicksand-sinking.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root cancels all Sep-Oct 2022 shows due to serious pelvic nerve injury
enrichment.description_long: September 17, 2022 Facebook post. Hunter Root announces cancellation of all Medusa's Disco and solo shows in September and October due to a pelvic nerve injury first sustained December prior. Dates canceled: 9/17, 9/23, 10/1, 10/14 (Threestival), 10/21, 10/22. Detailed, emotionally vulnerable post about chronic pain and physical therapy.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. September 17, 2022. 9/17, 9/23, 10/1, 10/14 (Threestival), 10/21 and 10/22 are all cancelled. Back in December of last year I suffered an injury to my 'tailbone' — I ended up damaging a major nerve in my pelvic region. When the nerve flares up it's indescribably painful and when it's not flared up I'm extremely uncomfortable at best. Sitting is unbearable. I need rest. ALL MEDUSAS DISCO AND HUNTER ROOT SOLO SHOWS IN THE MONTHS OF SEPTEMBER AND OCTOBER WILL BE CANCELLED. I'm not asking for pity but I'm physically and emotionally drained more than ever. EDIT: THANK YOU amazing humans for the support.

enrichment.description_short: Hunter Root models partner Danika's colorful sweater after Peace of Mind Cafe show rescheduled
enrichment.description_long: March 12, 2022 Facebook post. Hunter Root's show at Peace of Mind Cafe was rescheduled to 3/26 due to weather. He shares three photos modeling partner Danika's colorful patchwork sweater as a lighthearted consolation.
enrichment.extracted_text: Hunter Root. March 12, 2022. IG saw it first but I had to share. My show tonight at Peace of Mind Cafe has been rescheduled for 3/26 due to the weather. I'm bummed! On the bright side, Danika let me wear her sweater today and I decided to model it for you.
